title: Toaster's Bundle Keybind-Fix Mod
description: Changes bundles' keybinds to make them consistent with other items.
body:
Ever since bundles released with 1.21.2, I've been annoyed that they reversed some of the keybinds. This mod seeks to reverse this change, along with adding another change of my own.

Both changes can be toggled on and off via the ModMenu, or via the JSON config.

# #1: Keybinds
## Pre-1.21.2
This is the default behavior of this mod.
### Left-Click
- Always places or picks up, and always swaps with items.
### Right-Click
- Always attempts to insert or remove an item.
## 1.21.2 to Present
This is the default behavior of vanilla Minecraft.
### Left-Click
- Always places or picks up, but _also_ attempts to insert items.
### Right-Click
- Always swaps with items, and _also_ attempts to remove an item.
# #2: Empty Bundles
In vanilla, empty bundles can only be placed or picked up with left-click. This change allows empty bundles to be picked up via right-click as well.
